title: Persist structured misclassification-analysis payloads on evaluations
description:
## Summary
Persist the new misclassification-analysis results in a structured evaluation payload.

## Deliverables
- Define the stored payload shape for per-item classifications, category totals, overall assessment, and evaluation-level red flags.
- Persist the payload on the evaluation record alongside existing analysis data.
- Ensure downstream consumers can read the payload without scraping prose from RCA summaries.

## Notes
This is the storage/interface task for the new feature.
